analysis_plan_ref.anchor: sections 2 (rubric), 3 (hedge calibration + hedge-flip probes), 4 (pilot stage; gate SUPERSEDED by section 11), 5 (separation endpoints + NO-GO-BREADTH-CONFOUND), 6 (kappa arithmetic; SUPERSEDED by section 11), 8 (cost, revised 788 calls), 11 (kappa-paradox diagnosis + prevalence-robust AC1 instrument gates + calibration repair, AUTHORITATIVE for all instrument-validity gates), 12 (PROPOSED-ASM-1680..1691); estimand/scoring machinery inherited from docs/next/design/ontology-import-plan.md sections 7.1-7.8 (sha ef1df814285890a0cce7f91f4ec8fda88a31f2b039b0ca9764b5080e549a7dc2); analysis in analysis/ontg2v2.py (pinned in pins.analysis_script and pins.artifact_hashes)

arms_mandatory_baselines: A0 frozen-baseline — the g2 Pi hard-typing readout at its frozen primary score 33/84 (poc/g2/labels-proxy.jsonl, judge-pA labels); consumed as a pinned constant, no new calls (plan section 7.2); its statements contain zero hedge markers (measured), so the v2 rubric is extensionally identical to the v1 rubric on this baseline
A1 bfo-only — byte-identical v1 rendering (zero hedge markers, measured); breadth/vacuity control; CANNOT authorize adoption; NOW ALSO the comparator of the verdict-bearing separation gates
A2 bfo-sumo — byte-identical v1 rendering ('Normally' clauses, 83/84)
A3 bfo-sumo-framenet — byte-identical v1 rendering ('Normally' 83/84 + 'Typically' 63/84); the INTENDED ADOPTION ARM and the pilot arm (the v1 kappa-collapse operating point)

dependent_vars.definition: per-slot score: 1 iff the blind judge answers yes under the v2 sentence-force rubric AND the slot is non-vacuous in that arm (vacuous_by_arm from data/onto-softtype/soft-type-candidates.jsonl, unchanged); missing/cannot-say/no-label/invalid/vacuous = 0 (plan section 7.3; v2 rubric per design doc section 2)
dependent_vars.name: slot_sound

dependent_vars.definition: sum(slot_sound)/84 per arm on the primary (judge-pA) construction; fixed denominator 84
dependent_vars.name: soundness_precision

dependent_vars.definition: a3_yes - a1_yes and a3_r3_yes - a1_r3_yes (and A2 analogues) on the judge-pA construction, vacuity-zeroed — the H-SEP quantities; paired McNemar A3-vs-A1 (overall and R3 slice) co-reported, never verdict-bearing
dependent_vars.name: separation_vector

dependent_vars.definition: (arm_yes - 33)/84 with Wilson 95% intervals and exact McNemar on the paired 84 ids (judge-pA labels) — REPORTED, never verdict-bearing
dependent_vars.name: delta_vs_baseline

dependent_vars.definition: unchanged from v1: A3 must reach >= 67/84 overall and >= 34/42 on R3 (plan section 7.6)
dependent_vars.name: non_vacuous_coverage

dependent_vars.definition: pilot block (cal correct, pilot Gwet AC1_A3 WITH the full agreement table, kappa/PABAK/p_pos/p_neg and independence-ceiling AC1 co-reported, decisive, hedge-flip false-sat on the 8-probe block) + full-run Gwet AC1 per arm WITH raw agreement tables and the same co-reported panel (kappa never gated -- design section 11), decisive fraction per judge per arm, deranged-probe and hedge-flip-probe false-satisfaction per judge per arm
dependent_vars.name: instrument_vector

assumptions.claim: v1 verdict + diagnosis: g2-import INSTRUMENT-INVALID solely on kappa_A3 = 0.2859 < 0.40 (kappa_A1 0.527, kappa_A2 0.430; decisive 1.00; probe false-sat 0.0; pins ok); primary had been met point-estimate (a3 57/84 vs frozen 33/84, McNemar b=6 c=30 p=6.96e-05) but licenses nothing; A3 disagreement 27/84 concentrated on hedged composites (24/27 carry 'Typically'; hedge census A1 0/84, A2 83/84 Normally, A3 +63/84 Typically); v1 labels sha ed0c000e... quarantined as instrument evidence

A0 baseline: frozen g2 readout 33/84 = 0.392857 on the judge-pA construction (poc/g2/result.json sha 96a23be5...; labels sha 93a12447...); estimation-only caveat (its own n>=500 gate unattainable on this corpus) inherited and disclosed; zero hedge markers in its statements, so the v2 rubric change is a no-op on the baseline standard

build-time generation report (v1, re-pinned byte-identical): 84/84 slots rendered per arm; non-vacuous 67/84 (A1), 83/84 (A2), 83/84 (A3); R3 non-vacuous 42/42 at A3; zero hard operational axioms; 5 recorded conflicts

coverage disclosure (mandatory on every readout): kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, measured by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance — NOT general coverage; every soundness claim is bounded to these 84 self-authored kernel-v0-derived slots

estimand identity (PROPOSED-ASM-1550): same estimand, slots, arm bytes, baseline constant, primary gate, judges, rider, envelope as g2-import; only the instrument (rubric/calibration/probes/pilot) and the endpoint set (separation) change; v2 sentence-force rubric is extensionally identical to v1 on unhedged statements, checked mechanically at freeze (zero hedge markers in poc/g2/materials/items.jsonl and arm-a1-bfo.jsonl)

soft-only + source-closure invariants inherited verbatim from g2-import (binding:false, regime:policy, rank-only, five forbidden_effects, validator fail-closed; pinned BFO/SUMO/FrameNet + three frozen alignments only; no network fetch; no model-generated external fact)

pilot discipline (PROPOSED-ASM-1554 as SUPERSEDED by PROPOSED-ASM-1684/1686/1687, kappa-paradox redesign 2026-07-12): Stage P gates the full spend; pilot labels discarded from scoring; full run re-adjudicates all 84 items with fresh stateless calls; re-exposure of 40 item texts to stateless judge families disclosed and stipulated negligible; the pilot gate is a prevalence-robust Gwet AC1 gate at the operating point -- pilot AC1_A3 >= 0.65 on 40 stratified real A3 items (R3=20/R4=16/R1=4, sha-sorted selection pinned in pilot-manifest.json) over the both-decisive pair table (Cohen kappa/PABAK/p_pos/p_neg/independence-ceiling AC1 and the raw table co-reported, never gate substitutes; kappa NEVER gated -- the exploratory 2026-07-12 pilot measured kappa -0.021 at 70% raw agreement, marginals 0.875/0.775, Cohen p_e 0.706: the Feinstein-Cicchetti prevalence paradox), decisive >= 36/40 per judge, hedge-flip false-sat <= 2/8 per judge on the doubled 8-probe block; operating characteristics (pinned Monte Carlo, numpy default_rng(20260712), 2e5 reps, pinned at BOTH m=58/84 and the measured m=0.875): at m=0.875 P(pass) 0.116 at the v1-broken 0.679 rate, 0.691 at 0.80, 0.911 at 0.85, 0.992 at 0.90; independent-judge false-pass 0.300 -- catches a still-broken instrument ~88% for ~$1.4 at a ~9% false-stop on a merely-good (0.85) repair

fresh-runs/reuse (PROPOSED-ASM-1560): no logged proxy row of g2, g2-import v1, or the v2 pilot is consumed as a scored v2 output; A0 is a pinned constant; reuse-check recorded pre-spend with this entry as the recorded decision; v1 files stay byte-identical

the bridge table and all arm renderings predate this record and were not tuned to any v1 or v2 label (they are byte-identical to the audited v1 pins); the v1 ASM-1366-style check carries over; judges see fresh order seeds, no arm identity, no sources, no vacuity flags, and an identical rubric across arms

cost band (PROPOSED-ASM-1558 as amended by PROPOSED-ASM-1686): <= 788 stateless proxy calls (pilot 108 + calibration 16 + A1 208 + A2 228 + A3 228), CPU-only build, expected cash $1.4-6.3 (~1.26x the v1 624-call spend, which landed in its $1-5 band), conservative pinned price bound $0.012/call (1.5x the v1-measured <= $0.008/call worst case) with a LIVE dollar/call abort in the harness (bound-implied worst case 788 x 0.012 = $9.456 <= the $10 hard stop), wall-clock ~2.5-7.5 h at measured v1 per-call latency, concurrency 1 on this box

kappa-paradox diagnosis + gate redesign (PROPOSED-ASM-1680..1691, design doc section 11, 2026-07-12): the sanctioned Stage-P pilot aborted at preflight-pB (hedge-calibration 11/12: cal:hedge-1's unhedged head was a biological universal, not an ordinary-meaning guarantee -- the ITEM was unsound; repaired to the analytic 'Every bird is an animal.', PROPOSED-ASM-1688); the quarantined exploratory pilot then measured kappa_A3 -0.021 DESPITE 70% raw agreement (marginals 0.875/0.775, AC1 0.578, PABAK 0.400, p_neg 0.143, independence-ceiling AC1 0.587) -- kappa confirmed inappropriate at the v2 operating prevalence, AND the pair sits below its own independence ceiling, so the paradox does not exonerate the instrument (PROPOSED-ASM-1680/1682); the v1 84-item re-read shows the arm gradient survives every prevalence-robust metric (AC1 0.744/0.516/0.417), so the v1 INSTRUMENT-INVALID verdict was substantively right (PROPOSED-ASM-1681); the v1 soundness signal is bracket-robust (primary 57/53/42 all >= 34; R3 separation +10/+11/+6 all >= +5; overall sep term fails only on the concordant bracket 42 v 47 -- the breadth confound the sep-gate re-tests) (PROPOSED-ASM-1683); the redesigned gates are pre-registered in this record (AC1 >= 0.65 pilot + per arm; kappa co-reported only; burden shift to the prevalence-free known-answer channels; threshold-not-shopped disclosure: the known exploratory AC1 0.578 FAILS the new gate)

n_planned.call_arithmetic: Stage P pilot (6 hedge-cal + 40 real A3 + 8 hedge-flip) x 2 judges = 108 (pilot hedge-flip block DOUBLED 4 -> 8, design section 11.4); full preflight calibration (2 v1-cal + 6 hedge-cal) x 2 = 16; A1 (84 + 20 deranged) x 2 = 208; A2 (84 + 20 + 10 hedge-flip) x 2 = 228; A3 (84 + 20 + 10 hedge-flip) x 2 = 228; total 788 (design doc sections 8 + 11.4); A0 adds zero calls; pilot rows are instrument evidence only, never scored; LIVE dollar/call abort enforced by run-ontg2v2.py before every block: hard ceiling 788 calls AND bound-implied dollars (calls x the pinned conservative price bound $0.012/call, 1.5x the v1-measured <= $0.008/call worst case) must stay <= the $10 usd_cap (788 x 0.012 = $9.456)
n_planned.dropped_arms: A0 re-adjudication (frozen constant); human gold panel (post-proxy, maintainer-gated); gUFO arm (not loaded); WordNet enrichment (not loaded); any hard-law arm (forbidden); any re-rendering of arm materials (regeneration = pin break = new experiment, not a repair)
n_planned.order_seeds: fresh deterministic per-judge-per-arm-per-phase order seeds 'ontg2v2/1|judge-<pk>|<arm>|<phase>|2026-07-12' (phases real|probe|hedgeflip) with the run-g2lp sort-by-sha rule; pilot seeds 'ontg2v2/pilot|judge-<pk>|a3|2026-07-12' and 'ontg2v2/pilotflip|judge-<pk>|a3|2026-07-12'; pilot item selection sha-sorted stratified R3=20/R4=16/R1=4 with the 8 pilot hedge-flip probe ids (doubled 4 -> 8, design section 11.4), pinned in poc/ontology-import-g2-v2/pilot-manifest.json
n_planned.statistics: primary unchanged: exact integer gate sound_A3 >= 34/84 on the judge-pA construction (point-estimate adoption gate, NOT statistical superiority). New verdict-bearing separation gates (same character): sep_A3 := a3_yes >= a1_yes AND a3_r3_yes >= a1_r3_yes + 5; sep_A2 analogous. Co-reported, never verdict-bearing: Wilson 95% per arm; exact two-sided McNemar A3-A0, A2-A0, AND A3-A1 (overall + R3 slice); R1/R3/R4 slices; pair-union/pair-concordant brackets; judge-pB sensitivity; raw agreement tables per arm WITH the full prevalence-robust panel (Gwet AC1 gated at 0.65; Cohen kappa co-reported, never gated -- kappa-paradox redesign, design section 11; PABAK, p_pos/p_neg, independence-ceiling AC1) so no coefficient ever floats free of its base rates; pA/pB/pair-concordant bracket re-computation of primary and separation with flips disclosed; pilot block. AC1/kappa are proxy pair stability, never human-agreement evidence.
n_planned.verdict_name_mapping: pinned: PASS == GO-BFO-SUMO-FRAMENET (when /analysis/go_combined = primary_pass AND sep_a3_pass) or GO-BFO-SUMO + NO-GO-FRAMENET-pending-redesign (when /analysis/go_bfo_sumo_only = a2_pass AND sep_a2_pass AND NOT go_combined); FAIL == NO-GO-VACUOUS (when /gates/informative_valid false) or NO-GO-BREADTH-CONFOUND (when (primary_pass OR a2_pass) but the corresponding separation gate fails) or NO-GO-ONTOLOGY-IMPORT (neither A2 nor A3 reaches 34/84); INSTRUMENT-INVALID == pilot-stage failure (INSTRUMENT-PILOT-FAIL, named channel, full run never launched) or full-run instrument failure — no conclusion, repair and mint a new frozen run. A1 passing anything alone changes NOTHING. Every verdict sentence names its licensing arm and carries the rider verbatim.

endpoints.test: PRIMARY (unchanged, plan section 7.5 verbatim rule): sound_A3 >= 34/84 on the judge-pA construction with vacuity-zeroed scoring under the v2 sentence-force rubric — strict integer improvement over the frozen A0 baseline 33/84 = 0.392857. A point-estimate adoption gate, NOT a statistical-superiority claim; Wilson intervals and exact McNemar co-reported, never replacing the threshold. NOTE: primary_pass alone no longer suffices for PASS — see sec-separation-gate. [rider verbatim]

SEPARATION (new, verdict-bearing; design doc section 5): sep_A3 := (a3_yes >= a1_yes) AND (a3_r3_yes >= a1_r3_yes + 5); sep_A2 := (a2_yes >= a1_yes) AND (a2_r3_yes >= a1_r3_yes + 5) at /analysis/sep_a2_pass. Point-estimate engineering gates on the judge-pA construction; the R3 slice (42 domain/range slots) is where source-specific SUMO/FrameNet content lives by construction; +5 is half the v1-measured A3-A1 R3 edge (+10). Paired McNemar A3-vs-A1 (overall and R3) co-reported, never verdict-bearing. Failure with primary_pass true reads FAIL as NO-GO-BREADTH-CONFOUND (source-specific shard not licensed; soft routing not killed; A1 never adoptable)

STAGE-P PILOT GATE (never FAIL/PASS; design doc section 4 as SUPERSEDED by section 11, kappa-paradox redesign 2026-07-12): hedge-calibration 12/12 across judges (repaired set, cal:hedge-1 head made analytic per section 11.5) AND pilot Gwet AC1_A3 >= 0.65 (/analysis/pilot_ac1_a3) on the 40 pinned stratified real A3 items (R3=20/R4=16/R1=4; poc/ontology-import-g2-v2/pilot-manifest.json), computed over the both-decisive pair table with mandatory co-reports that are never gate substitutes: Cohen kappa (/analysis/pilot_kappa_a3 -- DEMOTED from gate to co-report: at the measured v2 operating prevalence pi ~ 0.83 kappa collapses toward 0 for accurate judges with independent errors, the Feinstein-Cicchetti prevalence paradox; the exploratory 2026-07-12 pilot measured kappa -0.021 at 70% raw agreement), PABAK (/analysis/pilot_pabak_a3), positive/negative specific agreement (/analysis/pilot_p_pos, /analysis/pilot_p_neg), the full agreement table (/analysis/pilot_both_yes, /analysis/pilot_both_no, /analysis/pilot_a_yes_b_no, /analysis/pilot_a_no_b_yes) and the marginal-matched independence-ceiling AC1 (/analysis/pilot_ac1_indep) AND decisive >= 36/40 per judge AND hedge-flip false-satisfaction <= 0.25 per judge on the DOUBLED 8-probe pilot block (<= 2/8; section 11.4 burden shift: the prevalence-free known-answer channels are load-bearing on an equal footing with AC1); ANY failure = STOP before any full-arm call, verdict INSTRUMENT-INVALID with the pilot channel named; pilot labels discarded from all scoring. AC1 threshold justification quadrangle (section 11.3): above the independence ceiling 0.587 at the measured operating marginals (independent judges pass 0.55/0.60/0.65 thresholds 64%/46%/30% of the time at n=40); tighter than the retired kappa gate's carried-over stringency (kappa 0.40 at v1 A3 marginals <=> AC1 0.51); between measured-broken v1 A3 (0.417) and measured-healthy unhedged A1 (0.744); at the pilot marginals demands raw >= 31/40, strictly beating the item-matched v1 subset's 30/40. Operating characteristics (pinned Monte Carlo, numpy default_rng(20260712), 2e5 reps, flip model, in pilot-manifest.json) at the measured operating marginal m=0.875: P(pass) = 0.116 at the v1-broken 0.679 agreement rate, 0.404 at 0.75, 0.691 at 0.80, 0.911 at 0.85, 0.992 at 0.90 (continuity row at m=58/84 co-pinned) -- catches a still-broken instrument ~88% for ~$1.4 at a ~9% false-stop on a merely-good (0.85) repair; the retired kappa gate at the same operating point would false-stop a good repair 30% of the time. DISCLOSED: the quarantined exploratory pilot's AC1 0.578 FAILS this gate; the threshold was not shopped to pass known data.
A2 (BFO+SUMO) against the same 34/84 gate; the GO-BFO-SUMO fallback now ALSO requires sep_A2 (/analysis/go_bfo_sumo_only); read only through the pinned verdict-name mapping

FULL-RUN instrument gate (never FAIL/PASS/NULL; design section 11.3): /gates/pilot_valid true AND Gwet AC1 >= 0.65 per arm (/analysis/ac1_a1, ac1_a2, ac1_a3; pair stability only; Cohen kappa co-reported per arm for cross-record continuity, NEVER gated -- prevalence paradox, section 11.1; PABAK, p_pos/p_neg, raw agreement tables and the marginal-matched independence-ceiling AC1 co-reported per arm so no coefficient floats free of its base rates) AND each judge decisive on >= 90% of the 84 real items per arm (0.90 is the highest RT-4-decidable bar at n=84; the v1 kill-text '95%' discrepancy is fixed to 0.90 verbatim everywhere in this record) AND deranged-sort probe false-satisfaction <= 0.30 per judge per arm AND hedge-flip probe false-satisfaction <= 0.30 per judge per hedged arm (A2, A3) AND all pins match AND zero blinding hits (any blinding hit aborts before assembly); the prevalence-free known-answer channels (calibration + deranged + hedge-flip) are load-bearing instrument evidence on an equal footing with AC1 (section 11.4); the readout re-computes primary and separation under the judge-pA, judge-pB and pair-concordant brackets and discloses any flip with equal prominence (section 11.3 honesty pins); failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID

informativeness guard (unchanged, plan section 7.6): >= 67/84 A3 outputs non-vacuous AND >= 34/42 R3 slots non-vacuous AND zero hard operational rules emitted; failure => FAIL read as NO-GO-VACUOUS even if nominal soundness exceeds 0.39
paired A3-A0, A2-A0, A3-A1 (overall + R3 slice) item tables, exact two-sided McNemar p, Wilson 95% intervals per arm, deltas — REPORTED ONLY, never replacing any integer threshold

R1/R3/R4 slices per arm, pair-union and pair-concordant brackets, judge-pB sensitivity scores, raw agreement tables + AC1/kappa/PABAK/p_pos/p_neg + independence-ceiling AC1 per arm, pilot block, pA/pB/pair-concordant bracket re-computation of primary and separation, BFO depth distribution and source-contribution counts — the plan section 7.8 reporting vector extended per design doc sections 4-6; descriptive, never verdict-bearing

A1 breadth-control reading — REPORTED ONLY as before; a passing A1 authorizes nothing; A1 additionally serves as the separation comparator (sec-separation-gate) but is itself never adoptable and independently flunks the R3 informativeness guard by construction (26/42 non-vacuous)

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY outcome: this is a G2-class formal/annotation DIAGNOSTIC over the SAME 84 self-authored kernel-v0-derived slots the g2 readout scored — never W1, never G4, no host model, no competitiveness sentence in any direction. Gold is the directive-#11 LLM proxy pair: every verdict is PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY; the later two-human adjudicated panel is the sole authority for any permanent scientific adoption, and a proxy GO followed by a human-gold failure is governed by the human result (plan section 7.7 last row). A PASS licenses exactly: bounded promotion of the winning non-binding soft-preference shard (advisory rank/lint/explain only, outside hard closure, provenance exposed) — it does NOT license hard imported laws, identity changes, automatic bridge endorsement, Pi-replacement (open maintainer decision 10), gUFO claims (not loaded; separately gated), any statement about ontology correctness, or ANY feasibility conclusion about either programme thesis. A FAIL is symmetrically scoped: it kills the imported-soft-type fix AT THIS SCOPE (84 slots, this rendering, this proxy instrument), not foundational-ontology import as such. The 34/84 gate is a maintainer-ratified point-estimate ENGINEERING gate; no superiority claim of any statistical form is licensed even on PASS (Wilson/McNemar co-reported for honesty, not for licensing). Coverage disclosure, mandatory: kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, measured by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance — NOT general coverage. Baseline caveat inherited and restated: the frozen g2 33/84 readout is itself estimation-only (its own n>=500 gate unattainable on this corpus). Every verdict sentence names its licensing arm and carries the rider verbatim. V2 ADDENDUM, equally binding: the separation gates are point-estimate engineering gates on the same footing as the 34/84 gate — a sep pass licenses no statistical-superiority or content-attribution claim beyond the bounded shard promotion already scoped; NO-GO-BREADTH-CONFOUND licenses no adoption of A1 and no kill of soft routing as a direction; the Stage-P pilot and all pilot labels are instrument evidence only and license nothing about any hypothesis; v2 labels are minted under the v2 sentence-force rubric and are never row-merged or trend-compared with the quarantined v1 labels except as instrument-repair before/after evidence.
hypotheses: H-SOFT (load-bearing, the issue-#20 bet): replacing the hand-authored HARD universal 4-sort typing (the measured 0.39 over-constraint) with IMPORTED, explicitly SOFT BFO/SUMO/FrameNet type expectations over the SAME 84 slots raises blind ordinary-meaning soundness to at least 34/84 on the primary construction — the over-constraint is a property of the hard-law routing, not of typing as such. [rider: PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY; same 84 self-authored kernel-v0 slots; point-estimate engineering gate; soft non-binding typing only; no feasibility conclusion]

H-SRC (secondary, source attribution): FrameNet valency evidence adds value over BFO+SUMO — read from the A3 vs A2 comparison; if only A2 passes the decision is GO-BFO-SUMO / NO-GO-FRAMENET pending redesign. [same rider]

H-BREADTH-NULL (anti-gaming control, equal prominence): broad foundational categories alone can appear sound by being vacuous — A1 (BFO-only) is the breadth/vacuity control; vacuous top-entity outputs score 0, and A1 can never authorize adoption regardless of its score. [same rider]

H-SEP (new, verdict-bearing, equal prominence for its deflationary reading): the imported SOURCE-SPECIFIC SUMO/FrameNet content contributes measurable soundness beyond soft routing + broad BFO anchoring — read from sep_A3 := (a3_yes >= a1_yes AND a3_r3_yes >= a1_r3_yes + 5) and the analogous sep_A2; the v1 breadth caveat (A1 55/84 within noise of A3 57/84, reported-only there) is promoted to a first-class gate whose failure reads NO-GO-BREADTH-CONFOUND. [rider: PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY; same 84 self-authored kernel-v0 slots; point-estimate engineering gate, not statistical superiority; soft non-binding typing only — never hard laws; no feasibility conclusion]

H-INSTRUMENT-v2 (premise, gated not hypothesised, two-stage; kappa-paradox redesign per design section 11): the directive-#11 proxy pair is stable on soft-hedged modality UNDER THE v2 SENTENCE-FORCE RUBRIC, measured prevalence-robustly -- Stage P pilot gate (hedge-calibration 12/12 on the repaired set; pilot Gwet AC1_A3 >= 0.65 on the 40 pinned stratified real A3 items, both-decisive pair table, kappa/PABAK/p_pos/p_neg/independence-ceiling AC1 and the raw table co-reported, kappa never gated; decisive >= 36/40 per judge; hedge-flip false-sat <= 2/8 per judge on the doubled block) THEN full-run gate (Gwet AC1 >= 0.65 per arm -- at the measured pilot marginals this demands raw agreement >= 31/40-equivalent, strictly beating the item-matched v1 subset's 30/40; decisive >= 0.90 per judge per arm; deranged AND hedge-flip probe false-satisfaction <= 0.30 per judge per arm; pins; zero blinding hits). Failure at either stage => INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL/PASS; pilot failure stops before the full spend (~$1.4). [same rider]
kill_criterion_verbatim: ONT-TYPE-G2/1-v2 kills (plan sections 7.5-7.7 as amended by docs/next/design/g2-import-v2-repair.md sections 4-6; fixed 84-slot denominator, vacuity-zeroed scoring, frozen baseline 33/84 — rider on every sentence): NO-GO-ONTOLOGY-IMPORT iff neither A2 nor A3 reaches 34/84 sound on the primary judge-pA construction — the imported soft type layer does NOT fix the g2 over-constraint and the type-layer-replacement direction of issue #20 dies at this scope (rescue paths named IN the verdict: (i) human-gold re-adjudication of the SAME frozen package, (ii) a redesigned rendering under a NEW record, (iii) the annotation-only bridge WITHOUT g2 routing — none licensed by this record). NO-GO-BREADTH-CONFOUND iff an arm clears 34/84 but its separation gate fails (sep_A3 := a3_yes >= a1_yes AND a3_r3_yes >= a1_r3_yes + 5; sep_A2 analogous) — the lift is attributable to soft routing plus broad categorial anchoring, the source-specific import shard is NOT licensed, soft routing as a direction is NOT killed, and A1 remains never-adoptable; treated as FAIL with equal prominence. NO-GO-VACUOUS iff A3 soundness passes but non-vacuous coverage < 67/84 overall or < 34/42 on R3. A1 passing alone can NEVER authorize adoption. INSTRUMENT-INVALID at Stage P (pilot gate, kappa-paradox redesign per design doc section 11: hedge-calibration < 12/12 on the repaired set, pilot Gwet AC1_A3 < 0.65 on the 40 pinned stratified real A3 items (both-decisive pair table; Cohen kappa, PABAK, p_pos/p_neg, the raw agreement table and the marginal-matched independence-ceiling AC1 co-reported, never gate substitutes; kappa is NEVER gated -- it collapses at the measured v2 operating prevalence pi ~ 0.83 for accurate judges with independent errors), decisive < 36/40 per judge, or hedge-flip false-satisfaction > 2/8 per judge on the doubled 8-probe block) stops the record at ~$1.4 with the full run never launched; INSTRUMENT-INVALID at the full run (Gwet AC1 < 0.65 any arm (kappa co-reported only), decisive < 90% (0.90 verbatim -- the v1 '95%' text discrepancy is corrected here), deranged or hedge-flip probe false-satisfaction > 0.30, pin drift, blinding hit) is no conclusion: repair and mint a new frozen run. Budget kill: reaching the 788-call ceiling, the $10 hard stop, or the live conservative price-bound abort (pinned $0.012/call, 1.5x the v1-measured <= $0.008/call worst case; 788 x $0.012 = $9.456 <= $10, so the bound-implied worst case can never cross the cap) before complete labels stops WITHOUT partial scoring. Deflationary outcomes get equal prominence with any positive. Rider verbatim: PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY; same 84 self-authored kernel-v0 slots; point-estimate engineering gate, not statistical superiority; soft non-binding typing only — never hard laws; no feasibility conclusion.

corpus_hashes._recipe: kot-corpus-hash/1: digest = sha256 over the UTF-8 concatenation of one line per regular file under data/<corpus>/ (recursive; symlinks and directories excluded), each line '<sha256-of-file-bytes-hex>  <relpath>\n' with exactly two spaces, relpath POSIX-style ('/'-separated) relative to data/<corpus>/, lines sorted by the UTF-8 byte order of relpath; reference implementation tools/registry/corpus-pin.py

pins.harness_manifest: TO-PIN-AT-OPS-AMENDMENT: judge CLI version banners printed by run-ontg2v2.py preflight recorded in each judge's preflight-status.json before any final-phase call (same discipline as v1)

model_revisions.judge-pA: gpt-5.6-sol via npx-pinned openai codex CLI 0.144.1 (exec, effort low, read-only, ephemeral, server-side output schema) — the directive-#11 primary stand-in invocation family, verbatim from poc/g2/run-g2lp.py
model_revisions.judge-pB: claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 via headless claude CLI >= 2.1.201 (tools disabled, no session persistence, thinking off) — sensitivity judge; vendor-family overlap with the materials' authoring agents DISCLOSED, never sole gold

runner_constraints.hardware: this box, CPU only (2 shared cores); judge calls are remote CLI invocations metered by the 788-call ceiling, the pinned $0.012/call conservative price bound (live dollar/call abort), and the $10 hard stop
runner_constraints.harness: poc/ontology-import-g2-v2/run-ontg2v2.py (pinned in pins.artifact_hashes; faithful port of the audited poc/ontology-import-g2/run-ontg2.py machinery with the Stage-P pilot block (pilot + pilotgate modes, pilot-stop semantics: no full-arm call may precede a green pilot), the v2 sentence-force template, the hedge-flip probe phase (pilot block doubled to 8 probes per judge, design section 11.4), the prevalence-robust Gwet AC1 instrument gates (kappa co-reported only, design section 11.3), and a LIVE dollar/call abort at the pinned conservative price bound $0.012/call; v1 files stay byte-identical). No build step regenerates any arm material; the build pass authors ONLY the new v2 instrument files.
runner_constraints.stage_discipline: ORDER, enforced: (1) coordinator registers PROPOSED-ASM-1550..1569 (registry/assumptions.jsonl, append-only); (2) experiment-designer role builds the v2 instrument files, runs run-ontg2v2.py mock <dir> go|nogo|instrument|pilotfail|breadth — ALL FIVE GREEN — and the pre-freeze skeptic attack (incl. hedge-calibration answerability, the zero-hedge no-op check on baseline/A1, independent sep-gate arithmetic, blinding scan of new files), then freezes via tools/registry/prereg-freeze.py; (3) tools/registry/reuse-check.py check --record registry/experiments/g2-import-v2.json --gate recorded pre-spend; (4) ops amendment fills pins.harness_manifest with both judge CLI banners; (5) runner role: preflight pA+pB, then STAGE P PILOT (pilot then pilotgate; any pilot-gate failure = STOP, assemble pilot-only result, verdict INSTRUMENT-INVALID; NO full-arm call may precede a green pilot), then per judge x arm real + probe + hedge-flip blocks (any cap pattern = STOP no retry; any blinding hit = ABORT), assemble; (6) analyst: verdict-gen mechanical + report; (7) cross-vendor Codex audit. Designer never runs/grades; runner never designs/concludes; the identity that authored the bridge table never judges.

title: g2-import-v2 (ONT-TYPE-G2/1 INSTRUMENT REPAIR + re-mint, issue #20) — the g2-import mechanical verdict was INSTRUMENT-INVALID solely on kappa_A3 = 0.286 < 0.40 (judge-pair instability on soft-hedged A3 renderings; primary point-estimate gate met but unlicensed). v2 repairs the INSTRUMENT and re-mints on the SAME estimand: same 84 kernel-v0 slots, byte-identical arm renderings (A0 frozen constant 33/84; A1 BFO-only breadth control; A2 BFO+SUMO; A3 BFO+SUMO+FrameNet adoption arm), same judges, same primary gate sound_A3 >= 34/84. Changed: (1) sentence-force rubric for hedged modality (unhedged sentences keep the ALL-normal-cases standard — extensionally identical on the hedge-free baseline/A1; 'Normally'/'Typically' sentences scored as usual-case claims), with 6 hedge-calibration items (12/12 gate) and 10 hedge-flip probes per hedged arm (<= 0.30 false-sat); (2) staged Stage-P instrument PILOT at the operating point (40 stratified real A3 items, R3=20/R4=16/R1=4; gate cal 12/12 (repaired set, section 11.5) AND pilot Gwet AC1_A3 >= 0.65 on the both-decisive pair table -- kappa-paradox redesign 2026-07-12, design section 11: Cohen kappa is co-reported, never gated, because the v2 rubric shifts the operating prevalence to pi ~ 0.83 where kappa collapses for accurate judges with independent errors (exploratory pilot: kappa -0.021 at 70% raw agreement) -- with kappa/PABAK/p_pos/p_neg/independence-ceiling AC1 and the raw table co-reported AND decisive >= 36/40 per judge AND hedge-flip false-sat <= 2/8 per judge on the doubled 8-probe block; failure = STOP ~ $1.4, full run never launched); (3) verdict-bearing A1-separation endpoints: sep_A3 := a3_yes >= a1_yes AND a3_r3_yes >= a1_r3_yes + 5 (sep_A2 analogous). VERDICT-NAME MAPPING (pinned): PASS == GO-BFO-SUMO-FRAMENET (go_combined = primary_pass AND sep_A3) or GO-BFO-SUMO + NO-GO-FRAMENET-pending-redesign (go_bfo_sumo_only); FAIL == NO-GO-VACUOUS (informative_valid false) or NO-GO-BREADTH-CONFOUND (34/84 cleared but separation failed — lift attributable to soft routing + broad anchoring; source-specific shard not licensed) or NO-GO-ONTOLOGY-IMPORT (neither A2 nor A3 reaches 34/84); INSTRUMENT-INVALID == pilot-stage or full-run instrument failure — no conclusion, repair and mint a new record. RIDER on every verdict sentence, verbatim: PROVISIONAL-ON-LLM-PROXY; same 84 self-authored kernel-v0 slots; point-estimate engineering gate, not statistical superiority; soft non-binding typing only — never hard laws; no feasibility conclusion.
